query: SELECT c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj, c.tipoPessoa, GROUP_CONCAT(p.numeroCnj SEPARATOR ' | ') as processos, COUNT(p.id) as qtd_processos FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN processos p ON p.clienteId = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT c.id, c.nomeCompleto, c.cpfCnpj, c.tipoPessoa, GROUP_CONCAT(p.numeroCnj SEPARATOR ' | ') as processos, COUNT(p.id) as qtd_processos FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN processos p ON p.clienteId = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.id;
